title: Creative Night Vision
description: Adds keybind to toggle Night Vision while in Creative or Spectator mode.
body:
🕶️ Creative Night Vision

> This lightweight utility mod adds a simple yet powerful feature: a keybind to toggle Night Vision while in Creative or Spectator mode. Perfect for builders, map makers, or explorers who want to see clearly in dark environments without fumbling with potions or commands.

🔑 Features

- Toggle Night Vision instantly with a customizable keybind
- Works exclusively in Creative and Spectator modes
- Seamless integration—no need for extra setup or permissions

💡 Great for building in dark spaces, inspecting caves, or navigating the void with perfect clarity.
